title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 191.815 - Administrative rules, procedure
text:
191.815.  Administrative rules, procedure. — No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of sections 191.800 to 191.813 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
(L. 1992 S.B. 449 § 7, A.L. 1993 S.B. 52, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
